setlocal enabledelayedexpansion
title 大菠萝视频批量压缩

:: 配置区（文件列表每个路径必须单独用引号括起来）
:: set "INPUT_DIR=C:\Users\ssx16\Desktop\abc"
:: set "FILE_LIST="C:\Users\ssx16\Desktop\abc\output1.mp4" "C:\Users\ssx16\Desktop\abc\output2.mp4" "C:\Users\ssx16\Desktop\abc\output3.mp4""
{视频路径}

:: 初始化设置
set "OUT_DIR=out"
if not exist "%OUT_DIR%" mkdir "%OUT_DIR%"
set /a "COUNT=0, TOTAL=0"

:: 统一文件收集逻辑
if defined INPUT_DIR (
    echo ===============================================================
    echo 正在扫描目录: %INPUT_DIR%
    for %%F in ("%INPUT_DIR%\*.mp4") do (
        set /a "TOTAL+=1"
        set "file_list=!file_list! "%%~F""
    )
) else if defined FILE_LIST (
	echo ===============================================================
    echo 正在处理指定视频...
    set "file_list=%FILE_LIST%"
    :: 更可靠的文件计数方法
    for %%F in (%FILE_LIST%) do set /a "TOTAL+=1"
) else (
    echo 错误：请设置 INPUT_DIR 或 FILE_LIST
    pause
    exit /b
)

echo 共发现 %TOTAL% 个视频待处理

:: 统一处理逻辑
for %%F in (%file_list%) do (
    set /a "COUNT+=1"
    set "input_file=%%~F"
    set "output_file=%OUT_DIR%\%%~nF_compressed.mp4"
    
    title 正在压缩 [!COUNT!/!TOTAL!] %%~nxF
    echo ===============================================================
    echo [!COUNT!/!TOTAL!] 正在处理: %%~nxF
    echo 输出到: !output_file!
    echo ===============================================================
    
    HandBrakeCLI -i "!input_file!" -o "!output_file!" -e nvenc_h264 -b 800k -r 25 -w 1280 -l 720
)

title 压缩完成：!COUNT!个视频 [!COUNT!/!TOTAL!]，输出目录: %OUT_DIR%
echo.
echo 压缩完成：!COUNT!个视频[!COUNT!/!TOTAL!]
echo 输出目录: %OUT_DIR%
echo 按任意键退出 ^^_^^
pause>nul"},"type":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"BAT"},"encoding":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"default"},"outputEncoding":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"oem"},"workingDir":{"VarKey":null,"Value":""},"runAsAdmin":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"0"},"waitToExit":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"0"}},"OutputParams":{"stdout":null,"stdoutOnly":null,"stderr":null},"IfSteps":null,"ElseSteps":null,"Note":"HandBrakeCLI","Disabled":false,"Collapsed":false,"DelayMs":0}],"ElseSteps":null,"Note":"","Disabled":false,"Collapsed":false,"DelayMs":0},{"StepRunnerKey":"sys:simpleIf","InputParams":{"condition":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"$= String.Equals({是否执行}, "No", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)"}},"OutputParams":{},"IfSteps":[{"StepRunnerKey":"sys:notify","InputParams":{"type":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"Info"},"msg":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"用户取消！"},"maxLines":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"0"},"style":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"Default"},"clickAction":{"VarKey":null,"Value":""}},"OutputParams":{},"IfSteps":null,"ElseSteps":null,"Note":"","Disabled":false,"Collapsed":false,"DelayMs":0}],"ElseSteps":null,"Note":"","Disabled":false,"Collapsed":false,"DelayMs":0},{"StepRunnerKey":"sys:simpleIf","InputParams":{"condition":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"$= String.Equals({是否执行}, "Cancel", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)"}},"OutputParams":{},"IfSteps":[{"StepRunnerKey":"sys:notify","InputParams":{"type":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"Info"},"msg":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"逐个处理!"},"maxLines":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"0"},"style":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"Default"},"clickAction":{"VarKey":null,"Value":""}},"OutputParams":{},"IfSteps":null,"ElseSteps":null,"Note":"","Disabled":false,"Collapsed":false,"DelayMs":0},{"StepRunnerKey":"sys:runScript","InputParams":{"script":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"$$@echo off
setlocal enabledelayedexpansion
title 大菠萝视频批量压缩

:: 配置区（文件列表每个路径必须单独用引号括起来）
:: set "INPUT_DIR=C:\Users\ssx16\Desktop\abc"
:: set "FILE_LIST="C:\Users\ssx16\Desktop\abc\output1.mp4" "C:\Users\ssx16\Desktop\abc\output2.mp4" "C:\Users\ssx16\Desktop\abc\output3.mp4""
{视频路径}

:: 初始化设置
set "OUT_DIR=out"
if not exist "%OUT_DIR%" mkdir "%OUT_DIR%"
set /a "COUNT=0, TOTAL=0"

:: 统一文件收集逻辑
if defined INPUT_DIR (
    echo ===============================================================
    echo 正在扫描目录: %INPUT_DIR%
    for %%F in ("%INPUT_DIR%\*.mp4") do (
        set /a "TOTAL+=1"
        set "file_list=!file_list! "%%~F""
    )
) else if defined FILE_LIST (
    echo ===============================================================
    echo 正在处理压缩指定视频...
    set "file_list=%FILE_LIST%"
    :: 更可靠的文件计数方法
    for %%F in (%FILE_LIST%) do set /a "TOTAL+=1"
) else (
    echo 错误：请设置 INPUT_DIR 或 FILE_LIST
    pause
    exit /b
)

echo 共发现 %TOTAL% 个视频待处理
echo 将启动 %TOTAL% 个并行处理窗口...
echo ===============================================================

:: 启动并行处理
for %%F in (%file_list%) do (
    set /a "COUNT+=1"
    set "input_file=%%~F"
    set "output_file=%OUT_DIR%\%%~nF_compressed.mp4"
    
    start "正在压缩：第!COUNT!个视频（共!TOTAL!个） [进度:!COUNT!/!TOTAL!]" cmd /c "echo =============================================================== & echo 正在处理: %%~nxF & echo 输出到: !output_file! & echo =============================================================== & HandBrakeCLI -i "!input_file!" -o "!output_file!" -e nvenc_h264 -b 800k -r 25 -w 1280 -l 720 & title 处理完成：第!COUNT!个视频（共!TOTAL!个） [进度:!COUNT!/!TOTAL!] & echo 处理完成: %%~nxF & echo 按任意键退出 ^^_^^ & pause>nul"
)

title 所有任务已启动：共 %TOTAL% 个视频
echo.
echo 所有处理任务已启动，共 %TOTAL% 个并行窗口
echo 输出目录: %OUT_DIR%
echo 按任意键退出控制器 ^^_^^
pause>nul"},"type":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"BAT"},"encoding":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"default"},"outputEncoding":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"oem"},"workingDir":{"VarKey":null,"Value":""},"runAsAdmin":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"0"},"waitToExit":{"VarKey":null,"Value":"0"}},"OutputParams":{"stdout":null,"stdoutOnly":null,"stderr":null},"IfSteps":null,"ElseSteps":null,"Note":"HandBrakeCLI","Disabled":false,"Collapsed":false,"DelayMs":0}],"ElseSteps":null,"Note":"","Disabled":false,"Collapsed":false,"DelayMs":0}],"ElseSteps":null,"Note":"大菠萝视频压缩","Disabled":false,"Collapsed":true,"DelayMs":0}]}
